Name: LI.FI

LI.FI is building a De Fi middleware for the application layer. A bridge & DEX aggregation protocol abstracts away the most crucial financial infrastructure to move in and out of any position on any chain — the one gateway to access all De Fi.**

Whoever (e.g. Trad Fi) wants to deal with crypto today is forced to deal with a multi-chain environment. Even the most basic liquidity flow requires connecting RPCs, cross-chain bridges, DEXs and DEX aggregators, token lists, gas estimation APIs, and relayer networks. Name: Nuventura
Description:
Nuventura develops medium voltage (MV) gas insulated switchgear (GIS) technologies that replace Sulphur Hexafluoride (SF6) - the world's strongest greenhouse gas (GHG) - with dry air.
